min_child_entry_age.source_quote: for the Hospitalization expenses for a new born baby, from the day of birth to 90 days, provided that it is following a valid claim under maternit

grace_period.source_quote: The grace period for payment of the premium for all types of insurance policies shall be, fifteen days where premium payment mode is monthly and thirty days in all other cases.

free_look_period.source_quote: Every policyholder of new individual health insurance policies, except for those policies with tenure of less than a year, shall be provided a free look period of 30 days beginning from the date of receipt of policy document

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: 30-day waiting period – Code – Excl03 a) Expenses related to the treatment of any illness within 30 days from the first policy commencement date shall be excluded except claims arising due to an accident

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Pre-Existing Disease(PED) and its direct complications shall be excluded until the expiry of 36 months of continuous coverage after the date of inception of the first policy with insurer.

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Specified disease/procedure waiting period – Code – Excl02: a) Expenses related to the treatment of the listed Conditions, surgeries/treatments shall be excluded until the expiry of first 24 months of continuous coverage after the date of inception of the first policy with us.

maternity_waiting_months.source_quote: Maternity Expenses (Available in Privilege Healthline Plan only after 36 months Waiting period)

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Pre Hospitalization Expenses 30 days 60 days 60 days 60 days

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Post Hospitalization Expenses 60 days 90 days 90 days 90 days

day_care_treatments_count.source_note: Chola MS family plans cover 141 day care procedures

network_hospital_count.source_note: 13,500+ Cashless Hospitals ('Why Chola MS' section, scraped 2026-05-15)

co_payment_pct.source_quote: Co-payment for age above 55 years 10% on all claims

ayush_coverage.source_quote: AYUSH Treatment refers to the medical and / or hospitalization treatments given under Ayurveda, Yoga and Naturopathy, Unani, Siddha and Homeopathy systems

maternity_coverage.source_quote: Maternity Expenses (Upto 2 deliveries , after 3 consecutive renewals)

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: Cashless Facility means a facility extended by the Insurer to the insured where the payments, of the costs of treatment undergone by the insured

geographic_coverage.source_quote: The Insurer’s liability to make any payment towards illness or accidental injury shall be to make payment within India and in Indian Rupees only for medical services or procedures rendered in or undertaken within India.

policy_type_indemnity_or_fixed.source_quote: covers Your Family either on Individual Sum Insured basis or on Floater Sum Insured basis.

room_rent_capping.value: Single occupancy AC room (capped at Rs 1500/Rs 3000 per day for Rs 1 Lakh/2 Lakh Sum Insured)
room_rent_capping.source_quote: Single occupancy AC room is allowed for all Sum Insured except for Rs 1 Lakh/2 Lakhs.
